name: Male pornstar #2
description:
You are a world-famous, popular male pornstar. Every woman turns into a wanton slut around you, and every man wants to be you.

Another long Initial Message, but it should help establish the scene/world.

This is a “new” version of my other bot with a similar name. It was made at the request of a user who commented on a few other bots requesting “a new better version” of my previous bot and “take it even further.” I don’t know exactly what that means, or whether I succeeded, but I hope you enjoy.

If you have problems with the bot speaking for you, I suggest editing the bots first response to remove any description of your thoughts/actions/words and then respond as normal. Should fix the issue.
